copy_ads.creative_title: The New Larroudé x Ciao Lucia Drop
copy_ads.creative_body:
The new Larroudé x Ciao Lucia drop is here. 

Easy summer styles with a little attitude — made for nights out, weekends away, and everything in between.

The shoe that makes every outfit look intentional. 

The Milan Dolly Low — structured where it counts, effortless the moment you put it on.

She’s flirty. She’s elevated. She’s Fiore.

Your warm-weather outfits just found their finishing touch.

Some shoes you love. Some shoes you live in.
The Biarritz is the one you live in. In stock and ready to ship.

Made for the hour everything looks better.
The gold flat that goes with everything — and makes all of it look intentional. In stock now.

Every era needs the right shoes.
Yours starts now. Shop the woven mule — in stock and ready to ship.

In stock now — don't wait on this one.

Everyone's wearing it. For obvious reasons.

copy_ads.creative_title: The Sandal for Every Summer Plan
copy_ads.creative_body:
Beach, brunch, errands, repeat. 

The Milan Sport Sandal was made for the woman with places to be — all the comfort of a sport sandal, all the style of Larroudé.

POV: your Larroudé order just arrived.

The Milan Sandal is even better out of the box.

Some decisions are hard. This isn't one of them.
The flat that never gets it wrong. In stock now — shop the Milan.

Not the sneaker you settle for. The one you reach for.
The Stella is in stock now — slip into something better. Shop before it's gone.

Secure your pair before anybody else.

Get your Fiore Sandal — 30% off.

Two brands. One collection worth talking about.
Larroudé × Ciao Lucia is here. Explore the full collab — limited, in stock now.
